steps.title: Set up the percentage calculation
steps.content: Maya used 70% of her total fencing. To find how many feet she used, we need to calculate 70% of 600 feet.

steps.title: Calculate 70% of 600
steps.content:
Convert the percentage to a decimal and multiply:
$$0.70 \times 600 = 420$$
Maya used 420 feet of fencing to surround the flower garden. That matches Choice C — $420$.
